title: French Shopify brands still leave SMS out of an otherwise mature Klaviyo stack
summary: A public research note on how often french Shopify brands appear to use Klaviyo email without a visible SMS layer.
contextLine: Updated from EnrichAnything market scans · live snapshot from March 27, 2026
dataNote: Built from the latest published EnrichAnything market scan.
citationText: Based on EnrichAnything's latest scan of matching brands, 100% already include an explicit gap signal and 60% include a timing note.
